title: Reflections snoitcelfeR
description:
What is this? Something feels wrong here...
[sine]...ereh gnorw sleef gnihtemoS ?siht si tahW[/sine]
notes: This event offers two distinct paths through the power of mirrors. [gold]Touch a Mirror[/gold] modifies existing cards in your deck: up to 2 upgraded cards are downgraded, and up to 4 upgradable cards are upgraded. This option is particularly useful if you have many upgraded cards you want to reset, or many weak cards that benefit from upgrades. [gold]Shatter[/gold] takes a more drastic approach—it duplicates your entire deck (adding a copy of every card you currently have) but curses you with the [purple]Bad Luck[/purple] curse, which can severely impact your run. The post-choice narrative pages contain gender-dependent pronouns reflecting your character's form.
